arts.ttl: Celtic told no manager in Scotland has earned the right to do what Brendan Rodgers has just done
arts.sum: Look, if Celtic weren’t winning games or trophies, then you question if Rodgers would even dare come out and be so critical. “I think Brendan has come out, spoken with passion and he is frustrated,” said Bartley.

arts.ttl: Arne Engels lauds consistent Celtic star set for landmark territory vs Dundee Utd
arts.sum: Celtic midfielder Arne Engels is one of the newer faces in Brendan Rodgers’ dressing room but has impressively taken to the role of becoming a leading light on the pitch. Arne Engels on Greg Taylor’s importance to the fold at Celtic

arts.ttl: Auston Trusty inspires with talk of the 'Celtic way' and 'fighting for a reason'
arts.sum: Auston Trusty has given an inspiring interview with club media as he and his peers stare down a very busy schedule

arts.ttl: Pundit makes 'a bold' and bizarre claim about Celtic boss Brendan Rodgers and Rangers' Philippe Clement
arts.sum: Brendan Rodgers lost his first Glasgow Derby game against Philippe Clement as Celtic went down 3-0 to Rangers at Ibrox just under a week ago. “Clement might have Brendan Rodgers’ number when it comes to the Old F-rm games but that’s because Philippe Clement and Rangers are set up to play against better teams where there’s a counterattack inside, like in Europe.”

arts.ttl: John Hartson champions Celtic star who is only getting started under Brendan Rodgers
arts.sum: Physically, he gets around the pitch, he’s a nice footballer, I think he’s a calming influence on the team when he plays and I think there’s an awful lot more to come from him. Speaking on the Go Radio Football Show, Hartson is ‘excited’ by the developments Celtic record-signing Engels is making in the engine room and believes there is still an ‘awful lot to come’ from the Belgium international.

arts.ttl: Auston Trusty clears up mystery post Rangers absence as he talks up Celtic moment that 'meant the world'
arts.sum: The £6million American centre-back sat out four fixtures on the bounce across the Christmas and New Year period

arts.ttl: What fans might not have noticed about Greg Taylor as Celtic release training session footage
arts.sum: The apparent furore over Greg Taylor, Brendan Rodgers, Kieran Tierney and the Celtic fans has hogged the headlines this week. Brendan Rodgers took a pot-shot at the Celtic fans after the St Mirren as he claimed the supporters singing Kieran Tierney’s name was ‘disrespectful’ to Greg Taylor .

arts.ttl: Jim Goodwin wary of Celtic threat as Dundee Utd warned ahead of Parkhead clash
arts.sum: In conversation ahead of Celtic’s clash against Dundee United, Goodwin made it clear that his side need to be wary as the Bhoys have the capacity to ‘cut’ teams open at the drop of a hat. Matchday is here and Celtic have the chance to move 16 points clear at the Scottish Premiership summit should they topple Dundee United this evening.

arts.ttl: The reported £10k-a-week gap that divides Greg Taylor and Kieran Tierney
arts.sum: As Greg Taylor's contract negotiations drag on, so too do rumblings of a Kieran Tierney return to Celtic Park - here's the £10k figure that divides them

arts.ttl: 'How'... Tony Watt can't believe Rangers didn't try and sign £1m Celtic player
arts.sum: But it was a player Celtic signed last summer who Tony Watt can’t believe Rangers didn’t attempt to sign despite the low fee it cost Rodgers to nab him on transfer deadline day. Luke McCowan was Celtic’s last signing of the summer transfer window after Brendan Rodgers shelled out £1m to land the former Dundee captain.
